BottleneckSummaryText: City A's dispatch window stays fragile while mana_shard stock remains thin.
OpportunityReasonText: Dungeon Alpha is City A's clearest expedition lever when mana_shard pressure rises.
RecommendationRationaleText: Use the latest relief window to stabilize City A's next dispatch before mana_shard pressure climbs again.
WhyCityMattersText: City A matters because keeping mana_shard pressure under control determines whether the next dispatch window stays stable.
